items.title: Honeywell beefs up energy security offerings with $2 billion Sundyne deal
items.author: Steve Gelsi
items.description: Honeywell International is acquiring pump and compressor maker Sundyne for $2.2 billion to bolster its Energy and Sustainability Solutions (ESS) business as the conglomerate prepares to break up.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Honeywell is expanding its energy security offerings through the acquisition of Sundyne, which aligns with its strategy to strengthen its ESS business as it prepares to break up the conglomerate.
